attributes.action: Complete freeze of vehicle excise duty until our roads are in a safe condition.
attributes.background: Release emergency funding to carry out complete road resurfacing of our crumbling and decayed roads after years of poor pot hole repairs, so they are drivable in a safe and acceptable condition, especially in our home counrty of Cambridgeshire.

rejection.details:
We're not sure what you would define as a "safe condition" for the roads.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do. Or you may wish to sign one of the following petitions:

"Provide funding to repair severe potholes and compensate drivers"
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760312

"Legislate for the repair of potholes within a time frame in the UK"
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757761

"Launch an inquiry into road maintenance & publish road tax spending"
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760470
